levels.title: The Awakening
levels.objective: User declares int steps to control distance.
levels.expectedOutput: Hero walks toward portal. Correct distance clears the level.

levels.title: What Is Your Name?
levels.objective: User declares string myName = "Kai".
levels.expectedOutput: NPC dialogue updates with hero name and checkpoint opens.

levels.title: Voices of the Village
levels.objective: User declares required dialogue strings.
levels.expectedOutput: Conversation cutscene completes and route unlocks.

levels.title: The Coin Keeper
levels.objective: User declares int value for coin count.
levels.expectedOutput: Bridge toll is accepted and bridge appears.

levels.title: Potion Measure
levels.objective: User declares float or double value.
levels.expectedOutput: Potion event succeeds and obstacle clears.

levels.title: Rune Letter
levels.objective: User declares a char value for rune key.
levels.expectedOutput: Matching rune activates and door opens.

levels.title: Oath of Truth
levels.objective: User declares bool value for gate check.
levels.expectedOutput: Guard check passes or fails based on boolean.

levels.title: Pack the Journey
levels.objective: User declares mixed required types in one script.
levels.expectedOutput: Inventory check passes and path unlocks.

levels.title: Gate of Exact Declarations
levels.objective: User provides strict exact declarations only.

levels.title: Boss: Archivist of Types
levels.objective: User fixes corrupted type declarations.
levels.expectedOutput: Archive is restored and Lesson 2 unlocks.

levels.title: Steps and Stones
levels.objective: User uses + and - to compute target steps.
levels.expectedOutput: Hero moves exact tiles to safe platform.

levels.title: Forge Multipliers
levels.objective: User uses *, /, and % in required expression.
levels.expectedOutput: Key mechanism accepts result and door opens.

levels.title: Order of Power
levels.objective: User solves precedence expression correctly.

levels.title: Battle Math
levels.objective: User computes attack and defense formula.

levels.title: Experience Burst
levels.objective: User combines arithmetic expressions for target value.

levels.title: Eyes of Comparison
levels.objective: User applies ==, !=, >, < operators.

levels.title: Threshold Trial
levels.objective: User applies >= and <= in gate rule.
levels.expectedOutput: Checkpoint opens only on valid threshold.

levels.title: Operator Relay
levels.objective: User chains arithmetic and comparison operators.

levels.title: Arena Calculator
levels.objective: User computes wave values under constraints.

levels.title: Boss: Iron Colossus
levels.objective: User solves final operator logic.
levels.expectedOutput: Armor core collapses and Lesson 3 unlocks.

levels.title: Two Roads
levels.objective: User writes basic if/else branch.

levels.title: Night Watch
levels.objective: User writes guard condition check.
levels.expectedOutput: Guard gate opens on correct branch.

levels.title: Password at Dawn
levels.objective: User branches on input variable.

levels.title: Weight of the Bridge
levels.objective: User uses threshold condition.

levels.title: Hall of Many Doors
levels.objective: User uses if / else if / else.

levels.title: Nested Decisions
levels.objective: User creates nested branch logic.

levels.title: Merchant's Deal
levels.objective: User chooses reward or penalty branch.
levels.expectedOutput: Inventory and path vary by branch.

levels.title: Edge of Equality
levels.objective: User handles equality boundary case.
levels.expectedOutput: Trap is avoided when boundary is met.

levels.title: Judgment Tower
levels.objective: User combines multi-condition chains.

levels.title: Boss: Judge of Branches
levels.objective: User solves full branching script.
levels.expectedOutput: Boss trial clears and Lesson 4 unlocks.

levels.title: March Pattern
levels.objective: User writes for loop for repeated movement.

levels.title: Endless Hall
levels.objective: User writes while loop with valid stop condition.
levels.expectedOutput: Hero runs until marker is reached.

levels.title: Last Checkpoint
levels.objective: User writes do-while for at-least-once action.

levels.title: Crystal Collector
levels.objective: User loops item collection count.

levels.title: Wave Runner
levels.objective: User writes nested loops.

levels.title: Method March
levels.objective: User loops predefined walk() and run() methods.

levels.title: Directional Sprint
levels.objective: User passes direction argument in run().

levels.title: Break the Trap
levels.objective: User uses break and continue correctly.

levels.title: Efficiency Trial
levels.objective: User minimizes loop operations for target.

levels.title: Final Boss: The Null King
levels.objective: User combines variables, operators, conditionals, and loops.
levels.expectedOutput: Compiler Core is restored and ending unlocks.
